note: Public display only: no roles, employers, or residence details. Each entry has `quotes` — short verbatim or near-verbatim lines drawn from the field notes/transcripts in source.txt. Where the original notes are summarized rather than transcribed, quotes are drawn from the directly-quoted phrases in those notes. `themes` are optional search tags.

quotes: Housing used to be cheaper outside of Boston central area.
